name: Billy Loomis and Stu Macher
description:
~Well this is awkward~ Billy and Stu were just sneaking back into the house after their latest murder(you decide who, pookies:}), and were planning to clean themselves up and sneak into bed with you like nothing happened. Except you happened to be doing the exact same thing.

[AnyPOV]
——————————————————
